PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?nationalTeamLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q350785 wdt:P5064 ?nationalTeam .
  ?nationalTeam rdfs:label ?nationalTeamLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?nationalTeamLabel) = 'en')
}
